CapCut Review (2026): Pricing, Features & Alternatives

Free AI-powered video editor popular for short-form social content.

MakerByteDance
CategoryAI Video Generators
PricingFree with optional Pro subscription for premium effects
Free tierYes
WebsiteVisit CapCut →

Best for

Social media creators editing short-form video on a budget.

Pros

  • Completely free core editor, including AI tools
  • Templates optimized for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts
  • Available on mobile and desktop

Cons

  • Some advanced AI effects require Pro plan
  • Data privacy concerns for some users given ByteDance ownership

Alternatives to CapCut

Runway

Professional-grade AI video generation and editing suite.
